title: Cured Puff Pak
description: This chewy, meal-prep-friendly American dish combines the flakiness of puff pastry with a savory cure and is perfect for pescatarian diets.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry sheets, leaving them a bit thicker than usual for easier cutting.
Using a cookie cutter or knife, cut out square shapes from the rolled-out dough. Avoid overlapping the cuts.
Place each shaped piece on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Spread a thin layer of cure mix evenly over each pastry square.
Brush olive oil on top of the cure to prevent drying and add flavor.
Sprinkle herbs (if using) on top for extra freshness and texture.
Bake in preheated oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Rotate baking sheet halfway through cooking time.
Allow to cool before slicing into smaller pieces for snacking.
